description: Delphi Digital hosts a panel featuring Ilya and Alex, co-founders of NEAR, discussing the intersection of cryptocurrency and AI, including the significance of the 'Attention is All You Need' paper and its impact on AI applications like ChatGPT.
topic_summary: The panel explores NEAR's origins in AI, the development of the Transformer model, and its implications for natural language processing and AI applications [t=0:24-486:46].
